chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2580 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For order on MA. 15234/2024. 2. For order on MA. 15235/2024. 3. For hearing of bail application. 08.11.2024 Mr. Abdul Basit, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant. == 1. Granted. 2. Granted. 3. Applicant Al-Wali Khan seeks protective bail in Crime No.811/2024 u/s 302, 34 PPC registered at P.S. Topi KPK. Learned counsel submits that the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in the present case; that applicant was unaware of the case and recently when police started raiding his house, he has come to know about the same; that the applicant is ready to approach concerned court however, apprehends his arrest, humiliation and disgrace at the hands of police, who is attempting raids at his house at the instance of complainant party. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective /transitory bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 10 days from today or surrender of the applicant before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE AK
